# Inkvelle — Documentation for LLMs

Inkvelle is a minimalist React + TypeScript typography library designed for high-end digital interfaces. 

It provides advanced entrance animations, automatic Google Fonts support, and deep customization through a `motionConfig` API.

## Core Features
- **43+ Animation Presets**: Rise, velvet, curtain, ground, cascade, hinge, slab, and more.
- **Auto Font Injection**: Just specify a Google Font name (e.g., "Fraunces", "Outfit") and it works.
- **Fine-Grain Splits**: Control splitting by character or word.
- **Custom Motion**: Pass raw CSS/Framer Motion keyframes through the `motionConfig` prop.
- **Italic Accent Toggle**: Seamlessly emphasize the last word/part of a string.

## Installation
```bash
npm install inkvelle
```

## Basic Usage
```tsx
import { Typography } from "inkvelle";

export default function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <Typography 
      variant="H1" 
      font="Fraunces" 
      animation="cascade"
      italic={true} 
      accentColor="#e11d48"
    >
      Design with intention
    </Typography>
  );
}
```

## API Reference (Props)
| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | (Required) | The content to animate. |
| `variant` | `Variant` | `"Display"` | Typography scale (e.g., Display, H1-H6, Body, Label). |
| `font` | `string` | `"Inter"` | Any Google Font family name. |
| `animation` | `string` | `"rise"` | Preset animation key name. |
| `italic` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to emphasize the last word. |
| `accentColor` | `string` | (None) | CSS color for the italicized text. |
| `motionConfig`| `object` | (Internal) | Advanced timing and keyframe config. |

## Documentation Link
For the full interactive playground and motion guide, visit:
https://inkvelle.edwinvakayil.info/docs
